reasoning: Severe packet loss on the downlink of the F1-c interface led to control plane instability between O-CU and O-DU, which subsequently propagated upwards to E2 and A1 interfaces.
actionable_steps: 1. Physical Layer Check: Inspect transport network for cable faults or hardware failures. 2. Interface Configuration: Verify F1-c protocol and MTU settings. 3. O-CU Resource Audit: Check transmit buffers and CPU utilization.
